immutable_core.semantic_intent: exact renal replacement therapy modality episode
immutable_core.semantic_definition: A positive labeled episode asset retaining one row for each ICU-stay interval during which an approved exact renal replacement therapy modality is active, with parent links back to broader any-RRT and family support episodes when applicable.
immutable_core.semantic_grain: one row per retained labeled episode interval
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Any database asset published as std_rrt_modality_episode must preserve exact RRT modality episode scope, retain a governed exact modality label, keep parent-link semantics explicit, and must not silently collapse to any-RRT active, CRRT-family active, non-CRRT active, RRT fluid-removal events, summaries, free-day outcomes, AKI/KDIGO phenotype truth, or renal SOFA truth.

episode_interval_contract.episode_start_rule: start at the approved exact-modality source interval start after source-faithful intervalization
episode_interval_contract.episode_end_rule: end at the approved exact-modality source interval end after source-faithful intervalization
episode_interval_contract.continuity_rule: merge overlapping or exactly contiguous approved source intervals only within the same exact modality and ICU stay; any positive gap or label change starts a new modality episode
episode_interval_contract.parent_link_rule: link each child modality episode to the largest positive-overlap any-RRT parent episode and, where opening-family eligible, to the largest positive-overlap family parent episode
episode_interval_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained positive exact-modality episode under the approved source-label rule; this does not prove absence of umbrella RRT support

external_alignment.alignment_policy: Use external terminologies as semantic anchors when reliable, but do not make them the backbone of the standard-variable system.
external_alignment.note: The current MVP identity is governed primarily by reviewed database-specific exact-modality interval evidence, ICU-stay interval semantics, and parent-link rules.

new_variable_trigger_examples: changing the concept to any-RRT active
changing the concept to CRRT-family active
changing the concept to non-CRRT RRT active
changing the concept to RRT fluid-removal event
changing the output to first-day RRT summary
removing the exact modality label from the retained output
version_bump_trigger_examples: adding a new reviewed database mapping while preserving exact-modality episode meaning
adding a reviewed exact modality label without changing the variable identity
tightening a parent-link or duration caution rule while preserving the same episode identity

execution_governance.formal_output_rule: Formal std_rrt_modality_episode outputs should go through execution.py reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec. Execute-mode runtime evidence should record both spec hashes and formal output-file signatures.
execution_governance.future_non_bypassable_rule: Formal std_rrt_modality_episode outputs should be generated only through the governed execution.py path reading this variable_spec and an approved mapping_spec.
